---
title: "Visiting ICERM Spring 2026"
date: 2025-10-23
description: "I'll be visiting [ICERM](https://icerm.brown.edu/program/semester_program/sp-s26) for the entire Spring semester!"
---

I'll be visiting [ICERM](https://icerm.brown.edu/program/semester_program/sp-s26) for the entire Spring semester!
